{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032207591953F3BA396BCD3C792F41"}"},"total":23},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7562001042738103065","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不知道是不是错觉，随着对情绪的一点点收回主角情感上的牵扯也越来越多，前期那种无所谓秒杀一切的爽感变淡了，与哥哥的差距也展现得越来越明显。同伴开始变多，导致他的牵连越多，无情的特性也少了许多开始在意起身边。但性格的基调目前还在还是挺喜欢的，比较期待会有对小时过去的描写和性格转变的细节经历吗？希望小时不是完全的孤身一人，但也希望他可以像之前一样无所顾忌随心所欲。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760668240,"group_id":"7512471302490311705","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93060172288"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512471302490311705","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"114"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13274,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7561676706308309785","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看啊，男主性格完全对我胃口，评论有人说圣母但我感觉没那么夸张，杀伐果断或者说是乐子人吧，并不是无目的的善心而是纯粹的利益牵扯以及看乐子。
求你了作者别断更，如果能完结说不定我还有机会追评给你写长评repo🥹🤲","text_exts":[{"e":36,"s":32,"text":"杀伐果断","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741375593C792F41%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227561676706308309785%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227512471302490311705%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%80%E4%BC%90%E6%9E%9C%E6%96%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760593591,"group_id":"7512471302490311705","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"九封遗留信","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7uPSX5o4eMJenBDQzrI/dA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6040647789094da59d0c6f341fdf1f2b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709464&x-signature=QyWRnXwMOpcyOF%2F1eBmUlfY%2BbOk%3D","user_id":"93060172288","user_name":"茶多酚子链"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"93060172288","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7512471302490311705","book_info":{"abstract":"[无女主无cp+诡异+无敌+搞笑]
裴时是谁
一个从死人堆里出来的嫌疑犯？还是个脑子不正常的精神病？
都不是。
裴时表示：我是好人，我真是好人。
一觉醒来，裴时发现自己回到了现实世界。
此时游戏还未降临，他被人当作了精神病，可其实诡异早已入侵现实。
身为诡异游戏中还没毕业的优秀学生，与诡异达成深刻友谊的裴时怎么可能会安于现状，反手加入了专门处理诡异的组织——异管局。
表面杀诡，私下……都杀。
后来红月降临，游戏消失却爆发了全球性的诡潮。
这次的游戏是现实世界。
于是，出现了一个怪异现象。
原本平静的世界不断出现诡异暴乱、诡潮。而每次事件发生的地点都会出现一个身影。
那就是——裴时！
人前是戴面具的神秘高手，人后……人后搁诡异这儿呢。
诡异看着裴时那张脸疯狂尖叫托马斯回旋转：再见。
在诡界流传这么一句话：裴时惨无诡道，若不幸遇上，算你倒霉。
裴时：怎么只追别人不追自己，自己不是人吗，嘤嘤嘤好伤心。
